ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  This is a routine compliance filing from AVT Natural Products Limited (AVTNPL) to the stock exchanges, confirming adherence to SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. The enclosed certificate from their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, Cameo Corporate Services, confirms the timely and proper processing of all dematerialization requests, including the cancellation of physical certificates and updating of the member register. This indicates sound operational compliance in share administration with no red flags identified.
